title: Simple Tiny Items
description: Simply shrinks your items down to a scale that make it much easier to see the world in front of you!
body:
# Simple Tiny Items

Makes held items 50% smaller in first-person view for better visibility.

## What it does
- Scales all held items to 0.5x size in first person
- Only affects your view - other players see normal items
- Works with all items from any mod

## Why use this?
Items blocking your view? This mod gives you clear sight lines while maintaining the look and feel of vanilla Minecraft.

## Installation
1. Install Fabric Loader
2. Install Fabric API
3. Drop this mod in your mods folder
4. Launch and enjoy!

## Compatibility
- Client-side only
- Works on any server
- Compatible with all item mods
